identity.name: Milton Health Centre
identity.meta_title: Milton Health Centre | Advanced Care, Human Touch
identity.meta_description: A modern sanctuary for your health. Family practice, walk-in, and specialized care in Milton, Ontario.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-slate-900 text-white px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-slate-800 transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 px-8 py-4 font-medium hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 font-medium px-4 py-2 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-lg transition-colors

cards.service_card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl bg-white border border-slate-100 p-8 shadow-sm hover:shadow-2xl transition-all duration-500 hover:-translate-y-2
cards.glass_card: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border border-white/40 shadow-xl rounded-2xl p-6

inputs.base: h-12 rounded-xl border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900/10 focus:border-slate-900 transition-all

principles.entrance: Staggered fade-up for lists, Parallax for hero images

parallax.hero_depth: Use differing scroll speeds (y-transforms) for background layers vs foreground text
parallax.image_float: Gentle vertical oscillation for floating UI elements

media.image_style: Hyper-realistic, high-key lighting, soft shadows, clean clinical environments. Avoid staged 'handshake' stock photos. Focus on equipment, interiors, and genuine interactions.
media.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for UI icons (Chevron, Menu, Search). Use custom SVGs or 'heroicons' for feature illustrations.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lenis' for smooth scrolling, 'framer-motion' for animations, 'lucide-react' for icons, and 'clsx'/'tailwind-merge' for class handling.
2. TYPOGRAPHY: Import the specified fonts in index.css. Do NOT use Inter.
3. HERO SECTION: Implement a parallax hero. The background image should move slower than the text. Use the 'interior_1' or 'hero_bg' image with a soft white gradient overlay so text is readable.

4. BENTO GRID: For the Services section, create a grid where 'Walk-in Clinic' and 'Family Practice' take up larger spans (col-span-2) and niche clinics take single spans. Use the 'service_card' style.
5. FORMS: Use Shadcn UI for the 'Contact' and 'Booking' forms. Customize the borders to be rounded-xl to match the softness.
6. COLOR: Use the '#FAFAF9' background for the whole page. Do not leave it pure white (#FFFFFF).
7. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every button, input, and link has a descriptive data-testid attribute.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use generic AI emojis.
No generic centered layouts for complex content.
